title: Create: Another Adventure
description: This modpack based on Create offers enhanced exploration for a more immersive adventure.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61138fc8ec281a83d6f39859c78c57af2db5beab.png)

About the modpack

This modpack was designed for an adventure centered around the Create mod. Exploration is at the heart of the modpack, whether in the Overworld, the Nether, or the End.

Features

- ⚙️ **Create** - brings automation and industrial aspects to the game, allowing you to build complex machines and ingenious systems. - 🌾 **Farmer's Delight** - enhances agriculture with new crops, recipes, and tools, making farm life more varied and interesting. - ❄️ **Fabric Seasons** - introduces a seasonal system affecting crop growth and adding a realistic dimension to your gameplay. - 🌄 **Terralith** - compatible with the seasons, this mod offers a new, larger map generation with new biomes in the Overworld, creating breathtaking and diverse landscapes. - 🔥 **Cinderscape and Nullscape** - improve generation in the Nether and the End respectively, adding depth and variety to these often overlooked dimensions. - 🏰 **Towns and Towers, YUNG's Better** - more exploration with additional structures and dungeons to discover, for ever more exciting adventures. - ⚔️ **MC Dungeons Weapons** - more weapons to diversify combat and allow each player to find their preferred fighting style. - 📡 **Wraith Waystones** - travel miles of blocks in exchange for a few XP levels, facilitating quick travel over long distances. - 🎒 **The Essentials** - includes essential features such as backpacks, drawers, game optimization, and a mini-map for better world navigation.

Join our Discord to follow development progress
